title: Red Wing Heritage boots, and how to buy them highly discounted
tags: Red Wing Second - 877D- Red Wing Heritage 8″ Moc Toe - Factory SecondOnce the footwear choice of factory workers and scaffolders in America’s heartland, Red Wing’s 887 boot is crafted from oil-tanned Oro Legacy leather. Premium Goodyear welt construction secures to upper to its durable Traction Tred outsole, while two-toned taslan laces ties them off in heavy-duty style.
